pilot_system.description: Pilots are characters that operate mechs. Each pilot has a unique passive ability. Pilots gain XP from kills and level up to unlock additional perks.

xp_thresholds.notes: Level 1 at 25 cumulative XP. Level 2 at 75 cumulative XP (50 more after level 1).

pilot_system.xp_per_kill: Equal to the killed Vek's max HP (e.g., killing a 2 HP Hornet = 2 XP). If a Soldier Psion is present, each Vek gains +1 HP and is worth +1 XP accordingly. Indirect/environmental kills (e.g., emerging Vek crushing another, environmental damage) distribute XP among all pilots in the squad; if there isn't enough XP to split evenly, XP is distributed to part of the squad on a rotating basis. Artificial Pilots do not gain XP. Pilots stop earning XP after 75 total XP.
pilot_system.leveling: At each level, the pilot is offered a choice of 2 random perks from the available pool. The chosen perk is permanent.
pilot_system.time_travel: One surviving pilot can be sent back in time at the end of a run, retaining their XP and perks for the next run. Failed pilots appear as 0 XP recruits in future runs.
pilot_system.death: If a pilot's mech is destroyed, the pilot dies permanently (unless the mech is restored by end of battle).

available_perks.name: +2 Mech HP
available_perks.description: Piloted Mech health is increased by 2

available_perks.name: +1 Mech Move
available_perks.description: Piloted Mech movement is increased by 1

available_perks.name: +3 Grid DEF
available_perks.description: Grid Defense increased by 3% resist chance

available_perks.name: Opener
available_perks.description: Gain Boost and +2 Move on First Turn

available_perks.name: Finisher
available_perks.description: Gain Boost and +2 Move on Last Turn

available_perks.name: Invulnerable
available_perks.description: Does not die when Mech is defeated

available_perks.name: Adrenaline
available_perks.description: +1 Move per Vek killed in a battle

available_perks.name: Technician
available_perks.description: Repair 1 HP at the start of every enemy turn

available_perks.name: Conservative
available_perks.description: Limited Use weapons are given +1 use

perk_restrictions.Ariadne: Cannot learn +2 Mech HP, Skilled, +1 Mech Reactor, or Conservative
perk_restrictions.Mafan: Cannot learn +2 Mech HP, Skilled, Technician, Masochist, +1 Mech Reactor, or Conservative

base_game.name: Ralph Karlsson
base_game.notes: Best pilot for leveling up quickly. Great for 'Field Promotion' achievement.

base_game.name: Lily Reed
base_game.ability_description: Gain +3 Move on first turn of every mission
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Excellent for positioning on turn 1. Great on slow mechs.

base_game.name: Bethany Jones
base_game.ability_description: Mech starts every mission with a Shield
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Top-tier pilot. Shield blocks first hit and prevents status effects. Essential for Ice Mech (prevents self-freeze from Cryo-Launcher).

base_game.name: Silica
base_game.ability_description: Mech can act twice if it does not move
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Extremely powerful. Double attack without moving. Costs 2 reactor power. Best on high-damage ranged mechs or Lightning Mech.

base_game.name: Prospero
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Grants flying to any mech. Costs 1 reactor power. Avoids water/lava/chasm deaths. Great on melee mechs for positioning.

base_game.name: Archimedes
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Shoot then reposition. Costs 1 reactor power. Great for hit-and-run tactics. A Sentient AI from Pinnacle.

base_game.name: Harold Schmidt
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Turns repair into a push ability. Good on tanky mechs that repair often.

base_game.name: Isaac Jones
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Doubles your reset turns per battle (2 instead of 1). Excellent safety net.

base_game.name: Chen Rong
base_game.ability_description: After attacking, gain 1 free tile movement
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Reposition 1 tile after attacking. Useful for getting out of danger zones.

base_game.name: Camila Vera
base_game.ability_description: Mech unaffected by Webbing and Smoke
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Immune to web (can always move) and smoke (can always attack). Counters Scorpions and Spiders.

base_game.name: Abe Isamu
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Reduces weapon damage by 1 (minimum 1). Does not prevent push, fire, bump, or spawn-blocking damage. Great on frontline mechs. Essential for 'Unbreakable' achievement.

base_game.name: Henry Kwan
base_game.ability_description: Mech can move through enemy units
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Phase through enemies. Great for positioning melee attacks from unexpected angles.

base_game.name: Gana
base_game.ability_description: Deploy anywhere on the map, damaging adjacent enemies
base_game.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
base_game.notes: Deploy anywhere + AoE damage at mission start. Costs 1 reactor power. Powerful opener.

secret_pilots.name: Kazaaakpleth
secret_pilots.unlock: Find in a special Time Pod encounter (FTL crossover)
secret_pilots.notes: FTL Mantis. Cannot repair — instead does 2 melee damage. High risk, high reward.

secret_pilots.name: Mafan
secret_pilots.ability_description: +1 Reactor Core. Reduce Mech HP to 1. Gain Shield every turn.
secret_pilots.unlock: Find in a special Time Pod encounter (FTL crossover)
secret_pilots.notes: FTL Zoltan. Mech has only 1 HP but regenerating shield each turn. +1 reactor core. Excellent on Ice Mech.

secret_pilots.name: Ariadne
secret_pilots.unlock: Find in a special Time Pod encounter (FTL crossover)
secret_pilots.notes: FTL Rockman. Massive HP boost and fire immunity. Best on self-damaging mechs.

advanced_edition_pilots.name: Kai Miller
advanced_edition_pilots.ability_description: Mech is Boosted if full health, otherwise -1 Move
advanced_edition_pilots.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
advanced_edition_pilots.notes: High risk/reward. +1 damage while undamaged, -1 move when hurt.

advanced_edition_pilots.name: Rosie Rivets
advanced_edition_pilots.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
advanced_edition_pilots.notes: Mobile healer. Heals adjacent allies by moving near them.

advanced_edition_pilots.name: Morgan Lejeune
advanced_edition_pilots.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
advanced_edition_pilots.notes: Snowball pilot. Each kill grants Boost for next attack.

advanced_edition_pilots.name: Adam
advanced_edition_pilots.ability_description: On Reset Turn, gain Shield and +2 Move
advanced_edition_pilots.unlock: Found in Time Pod or Perfect Island reward
advanced_edition_pilots.notes: Makes reset turns more powerful with shield + movement.

cyborg_pilots.name: Cyborg Pilot
cyborg_pilots.ability_description: Normal Pilots cannot be equipped. Loses 25 XP when the unit is disabled.
cyborg_pilots.unlock: Unlock the Secret Squad by completing all Achievements
cyborg_pilots.notes: Cyborg Pilots have randomly-selected names and a portrait depending on their mech. They are both Pilot and Mech in one.

ftl_pilot_encounter.description: FTL crossover pilots (Kazaaakpleth, Mafan, Ariadne) are found via special encounters during missions.
ftl_pilot_encounter.trigger: Look for marked mountain or ice tiles at mission start. These can be identified by a small glowing dot and being damaged by 1 point prematurely.
process: Break the marked mountain or ice tile to reveal a Strange Object beacon.
Move a mech or allied unit onto the beacon tile to collect it.
After ending the turn, a Strange Pod will drop from the sky.
Protect the Strange Pod until the end of the mission.
ftl_pilot_encounter.reward: Recovering the Strange Pod grants one of the secret pilots and a reactor core.
ftl_pilot_encounter.permanent_unlock: Once unlocked, secret pilots become permanently available as starting pilots without repeating the encounter.
